name: HashiCorp Vault (Dev Mode)
description: Secrets management and encryption-as-a-service in a ready-to-use dev server. Store API keys, database credentials and certificates, then read them from your apps over HTTP. A local stand-in for AWS Secrets Manager and Parameter Store.

aws.parity: Read/write secrets locally through Vault's API exactly as you will via Secrets Manager — same get/put lifecycle.
aws.deploy: Migrate the KV secrets into AWS Secrets Manager and swap the SDK; use KMS for the encryption keys.

variables.label: HTTP / UI Port
variables.description: Host port for the Vault HTTP API and web UI.

variables.label: Root Token
variables.description: Root token used to authenticate against the dev server.
